raw_consumer_statement: I applied for a Citi card in XX/XX/XXXX and transferred the balance from a XXXX XXXX card to this card. I have my personal bank account with XXXX XXXX, where I have made payments ON-LINE from this account. I have NOT made any payments over the phone. I submitted an online payment of {$100.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, another {$100.00} payment on XX/XX/XXXX, a payment of {$100.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, a {$200.00} payment on XX/XX/XXXX, a {$100.00} payment on XXXX, XXXX, a {$150.00} payment on XX/XX/XXXX, and a {$100.00} payment on XX/XX/XXXX. Starting around XXXX. XXXX, XXXX, all sorts of fraudulent charges and payments started showing up on my account. I reported it in XXXX, XXXX, and the customer service rep said it would be investigated and handled. Citibank initially removed the charges, then they reinstated all of the fraudulent charges and removed the fraudulent payments. I have NEVER used this card for any purchases of any sort. I only opened this account to transfer part of my XXXX XXXX balance to this no-finance card. Now Citibank is giving me the runaround about taking those fraudulent charges off of my account.
